content.claim: Finnish difference-in-differences evidence (2010-2018) shows school closures preceded accelerated local depopulation in surrounding communities, but this is Finland-specific and correlational; replication for Hungary not found.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Context-specific to Finland; causal direction not definitively proven (closure may precede but not cause depopulation)
No evidence of similar association tested in Hungarian data
Confounding by shared prior economic decline not fully ruled out
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
